/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libnavsystem__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libnavsystem__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/navsystem__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/navsystem/msg/detail/message__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/navsystem__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/navsystem/srv/detail/get_nav__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/navsystem__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/navsystem/srv/detail/set_nav__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
